About Miftah Fentaw

I am a passionate Junior Mobile Developer and IT Student at Haramaya University, dedicated to creating exceptional digital experiences.

With growing expertise in Flutter and React Native, I build mobile applications that users love. My studies in Information Technology provide me with a strong foundation in programming, while my hands-on experience in mobile development allows me to deliver innovative solutions.

Local Tech Company
2025 - Present

Working on cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and React Native, gaining hands-on experience in real-world projects.

Projects

My recent work.

FlutterProviderFirebase

Gebeya E-commerce Mobile App

Developed a comprehensive cross-platform e-commerce mobile application for Gebeya using Flutter, featuring advanced product listings, intelligent shopping cart functionality, and secure payment integration. Implemented state management with Provider pattern and integrated with Firebase for real-time data synchronization and user authentication.

Features:Real-time inventory, Push notifications, Offline support, Multi-language support, User authentication, Payment integration
View CodePreview
React NativeNode.jsMongoDB

ConnectSocial Platform

Built a full-stack social media platform with React Native for the frontend and Node.js/Express for the backend. Features include real-time messaging, post creation with media uploads, user authentication with JWT, and comprehensive notification system using Socket.io.

Features:Real-time chat, Media sharing, User profiles, Push notifications, Content moderation
view codePreview
PythonAutomationScripting

AutoSort — File Organizer Script

Created a simple Python automation script that organizes files into folders based on their type (images, videos, documents, etc.). This project helped me learn file handling, automation, and scripting basics using Python.

Features:File sorting, Folder creation, Automation, Lightweight and easy to use
view codePreview
KotlinAndroidSupebase

Taskify

Built a very detailed,robust and responsive to-do and task management Mobile app where users can add, edit, and delete daily tasks. Data is stored in supebase , and the UI updates instantly.

Features:Project scaffolding, File operations, API testing, Custom scripts, Cross-platform support
view codePreview
